summary: An FPV drone destroyed a Russian Ka-27 helicopter on the "Sivash" drilling platform in the Black Sea, where a USV also struck and launched drones controlled via Starlink. Ukrainian forces from the 25th Sicheslav Airborne Brigade and 68th Jaeger Brigade evacuated a wounded soldier on the Pokrovsk axis. Russian operators of the "Rubicon" Center reported 128 targets destroyed on March 5, including Ukrainian tanks, artillery, and air defense systems. A FAB-3000 bomb with UMPK struck Ukrainian positions in Krasny Liman, with the destruction captured by an optical fiber FPV drone. Russian forces are using a Chinese PTS-303 rotating antenna system, costing 3-5 thousand hryvnias, to counter FPV drones.
